text_marked: ⟦Despite⟧ the ⟦cruel⟧ winter, the old ⟦servant⟧ kept the manor running with ⟦thrifty⟧ care. In the ⟦pantry⟧ she would ⟦stew⟧ a ⟦thick⟧ ⟦cargo⟧ of ⟦bread⟧, ⟦bone⟧ broth, and ⟦canned⟧ vegetables, ladling it from a battered frying ⟦foil⟧ into bowls warmed beside the fireplace. Her ⟦boldness⟧ was ⟦noticeable⟧, even ⟦awesome⟧, though she never sought to ⟦entertain⟧ the ⟦nobility⟧ with idle talk. One ⟦operational⟧ rule guided her: ⟦inspect⟧ everything twice. She would ⟦wipe⟧ each fixture, scrub the ⟦carriage⟧ wheels, and ⟦tabulate⟧ the household ⟦money⟧ in a ledger no ⟦typist⟧ could fault. The estate's ⟦deficit⟧ had grown ⟦vast⟧, a ⟦fatal⟧ ⟦dumping⟧ of debt, and the ⟦warden⟧ warned that ⟦creditworthiness⟧ was now critical. A ⟦pragmatic⟧ woman, she refused to ⟦panic⟧. The ⟦version⟧ of thrift she practiced was almost ⟦theoretical⟧, yet it worked. Despite ⟦hostile⟧ neighbors and a ⟦regional⟧ ⟦racism⟧ that made her position ⟦unpleasant⟧, she stayed ⟦favorable⟧ in spirit, ⟦doggedly⟧ cheerful. When the young lord, ⟦sly⟧ and ⟦reactionary⟧, threatened to ⟦sack⟧ her, she did not ⟦bleed⟧ self-pity. She would ⟦invest⟧ her own meager allowance to ⟦underwrite⟧ repairs, even ⟦venture⟧ savings to buy a ⟦medium⟧ grade of coal. A ⟦territorial⟧ dispute with the next estate had reached deadlock; a ⟦hopeless⟧ inconsistency in the old deeds made the boundary ⟦missing⟧ from every map. One ⟦marvellous⟧ morning, while she swept the courtyard, a ⟦left-handed⟧ clerk arrived by ⟦expressway⟧ with a ⟦telegram⟧. The ⟦bloc⟧ of lawyers had reached a verdict. To ⟦substantiate⟧ the family's claim, they needed the original ⟦decode⟧ of a coded letter hidden behind a loose bone of the chimney. She climbed up, a ⟦riotous⟧ wind tugging her ⟦mantle⟧, and amplified her grip on a ⟦bolt⟧ as the ladder shook. The ⟦residue⟧ of soot made her cough; a ⟦ripple⟧ of dust rose like a ⟦whirlwind⟧. With a ⟦dash⟧ she pulled the paper free, then gave a triumphant ⟦shout⟧. The ⟦cyclic⟧ seasons of worry seemed to ⟦splash⟧ away. The document, written in shorthand that read like a foreign ⟦epoch⟧, proved the land was theirs. No ⟦mischief⟧, no ⟦filth⟧ of rumor, could now stain the house. That night they watched a flickering ⟦video⟧ on a borrowed set, played ⟦chess⟧, and skated on the frozen ⟦pool⟧. The lord, his ⟦paranoia⟧ eased, vowed to defend her against any awesome threat. She had shown, with quiet nobility, that one careful servant could not be dwarfed by fate. A racism-free, hopeful order took root. Even the ⟦hut⟧ at the gate, where she had first slept in a sack on a bed of straw, now flew a small ⟦badge⟧ of honor. She rented out a spare ⟦row⟧ of cottages, turned a once-rusty estate profitable, and showed that boldness paired with thrift makes any winter survivable. To ⟦show⟧ the books, she would ⟦debit⟧ each expense and ⟦rent⟧ receipt, ⟦attentive⟧ to the last ⟦centigrade⟧ of detail, never ⟦inconsistent⟧. Her ⟦maths⟧ was clean, with no ⟦ellipsis⟧ of any figure. As an ⟦inhabitant⟧ of ⟦fourteen⟧ winters in that house, she understood the ⟦importance⟧ of trust, and ⟦warmly⟧ she would ⟦amplify⟧ her praise of the staff rather than ⟦protest⟧ their small faults. On the frozen pond the children would ⟦skate⟧, and the estate, once doomed, seemed to ⟦vanquish⟧ its debts.
translation_plain: 尽管冬天严酷，那位年迈的仆人仍以节俭的细心维持着庄园的运转。在食品柜里，她会炖上厚厚一大批面包、骨头汤和罐装蔬菜，用一只破旧的煎锅箔把它从锅里舀进碗中，碗就在壁炉旁温着。她的胆略显而易见，甚至令人敬畏，尽管她从不想用闲聊去取悦贵族。一条经营准则指引着她：凡事检查两遍。她会擦拭每件固定装置，刷洗马车轮，并在一本连打字员都挑不出错的账簿里把家用钱列成表。庄园的赤字已增得庞大，是一场致命的债务倾销，看守警告说如今信誉至关重要。作为一个注重实效的女人，她拒绝惊慌。她所奉行的那种节俭近乎理论化，却行之有效。尽管邻人怀有敌意，地区性的种族歧视让她的处境令人不快，她在精神上仍保持乐观，顽固地开朗。当那位狡猾又保守反动的年轻领主威胁要解雇她时，她并不自怜流血。她会拿出自己微薄的津贴去承担修缮，甚至冒险动用积蓄买中等品级的煤。与邻近庄园的领土纠纷陷入僵局；旧地契里一处毫无希望的前后矛盾使边界在每张地图上都缺失。一个绝妙的早晨，她在打扫庭院时，一位左撇子文书乘高速公路带来一封电报。律师集团已作出裁决。为了证实这家人的主张，他们需要藏在烟囱一块松动骨头后面的一封密信的原始解码。她爬上去，狂乱的风扯着她的斗篷，梯子摇晃时她加紧抓住一个螺栓。煤灰的残渣让她咳嗽；一阵尘土像旋风般泛起涟漪。她猛地一冲把纸抽了出来，随即发出胜利的喊叫。忧虑那循环往复的季节似乎被泼洒而去。那份用速记写成、读来像异国时代的文件，证明了这片土地属于他们。如今任何恶作剧、任何谣言的污秽都无法玷污这个家族。那晚他们在借来的机器上看了一段闪烁的录像，下了国际象棋，又在结冰的水池上滑冰。领主的偏执缓解了，发誓要保护她免受任何可怕的威胁。她以安静的高尚证明了，一个细心的仆人不会被命运矮化。一种没有种族歧视、充满希望的秩序扎下了根。连大门口那间小屋——她最初睡在稻草床上一个麻袋里的地方——如今也挂起了一枚小小的荣誉徽章。她把一排空置的农舍租了出去，把一座曾经生锈的庄园变得有利可图，证明了胆略加上节俭能让任何寒冬都熬得过去。为了展示账目，她会把每一笔开支和租金收据记入借方，连最细微的一摄氏度细节都全神贯注，从不前后矛盾。她的算术干净利落，没有省略任何一个数字。作为在那座房子里度过十四个冬天的住户，她懂得信任的重要性，她会热情地放大对员工的称赞，而不是抗议他们的小过失。在结冰的池塘上，孩子们滑冰，而这座一度注定衰败的庄园，似乎征服了它的债务。
